chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا يَجِبُ مِنْ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي كُلِّ مَجْلِسٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – What is Obligated from the Mention of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic in every gathering

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/123)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/123)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَا مِنْ قَوْمٍ اجْتَمَعُوا فِي مَجْلِسٍ فَلَمْ يَذْكُرُوا اسْمَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ لَمْ يُصَلُّوا عَلَى نَبِيِّهِمْ إِلَّا كَانَ ذَلِكَ الْمَجْلِسُ حَسْرَةً وَ وَبَالًا عَلَيْهِمْ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Husayn Bin Zayd,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘There is none from a group gathering in a gather, so they are not mentioning the Name of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic and are not sending Salawāt upon their Prophetas, except that gathering would be a regret and an evil result upon them’.
en.sarwar: 5. Abu Ali al-Ash’ari has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan ibn Yahya from Husayn ibn Zayd from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘If a people gather together in a place and do not speak of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, and do not ask from Allah favors al-Salat for His Holy Prophet, that gathering will become a regret and a loss for them (on the Day of Judgment).’”
